March-April 2006

Elizabeth Marchak December 1999
Public Safety

CAR HELPS UNCOVER THE DETAILS - Kennedy Crash

Andy Lehren October 1999
Public Safety

An in-depth analysis of John F. Kennedy Jr.'s plane crash using aviation databases to explore potential causes, highlighting spatial disorientation and pilot error.

Returning to regress

Neill A. Borowski September 1999

Naming the unknown

Dawn Fallik June 1999
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsPublic Safety

Sampley's investigation led to the exhumation and identification of the Vietnam-era Unknown Soldier using military databases, revealing him to be Lt. Michael Joseph Blassie.

Datacore News

December 1990
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsPublic Safety

Beginning in January, Datacore will finally be ready for use. Datacore is an on-line database service that can be used by reporters to access government records.
